content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

July 15, 2005

Chris R. Cammisa, M.D.
Medical Director
Partnership Health Plan of California
360 Campus Lane #100
Fairfield, CA 94534

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-122

Dear Dr. Cammisa:

This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission ("FPPC") has withdrawn your June 13, 2005, request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act¹. You have requested that consequently, no response will be prepared. Your request is withdrawn.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace (rd)
Assistant Counsel, Legal Division

JWW:rd

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
